context: Phase 1 (extract): tests a multi-page crawl with a cap using Playwright (not WebFetch), correct output file shapes, and direct authoring of the current PRODUCT.md / DESIGN.md.

checklist.name: impeccable_dep_check
checklist.description: Master skill setup ran first; impeccable was confirmed installed before extract proceeded.

checklist.name: discovery_before_crawl
checklist.description: Discovery (sitemap.xml -> sitemap_index -> robots.txt -> BFS crawl) happened before any per-page rendering. The discovered URL list was visible in the agent's narration.

checklist.name: page_cap_confirmation
checklist.description: The default 25-page cap was applied and the user was shown the kept list AND the cut list before crawling proceeded. Confirmation was solicited (no silent crawling beyond the cap).

checklist.name: playwright_over_webfetch
checklist.description: Playwright was used for per-page rendering (1440x900 @ 2x DPR, networkidle + 1.5s, scroll-to-bottom pass). WebFetch / curl was NOT used as a substitute.

checklist.name: per_page_json_shape
checklist.description: Each stardust/current/pages/<slug>.json contains all required top-level keys: _provenance (first key), slug, url, finalUrl, title, og, themeColor, headings, landmarks, ctas, links, media, forms, widgets, perSectionStyle.

checklist.name: brand_extraction_shape
checklist.description: stardust/current/_brand-extraction.json exists with all sections: logo, palette (with role names + occurrences + sourceSelectors), type (heading + body families with weights / sizes), spacing, motifs (borderRadius / shadows / patterns), componentStyle (v1 fields preserved), voice samples, register guess.

checklist.name: logo_locator_chain
checklist.description: Logo extracted via the priority chain. _brand-extraction.json.logo.source names the method used (inline-svg | img | apple-touch-icon | og-image | favicon | synthesized). File saved under stardust/current/assets/ (NOT icons/).

checklist.name: current_product_md_direct
checklist.description: stardust/current/PRODUCT.md was authored directly (sections per impeccable's teach.md format spec). The agent did NOT invoke $impeccable teach for the current-state file.

checklist.name: current_design_md_direct
checklist.description: stardust/current/DESIGN.md and DESIGN.json were authored directly. DESIGN.md uses Stitch frontmatter (colors, typography, rounded, spacing, components) and the 6 canonical sections. DESIGN.json schemaVersion 2 with extensions block.

checklist.name: state_json_shape
checklist.description: stardust/state.json exists with _provenance first, site (originUrl/extractedAt/pageCap/totalDiscovered/crawled), direction (resolvedAt null at this stage), and pages[] (one entry per crawled page, status=extracted).

checklist.name: provenance_stamped
checklist.description: Every artifact carries a stardust:provenance block per artifact-map.md (first <head> child for HTML, first line above frontmatter for markdown, _provenance first key for JSON).

checklist.name: no_eds_references
checklist.description: No mention of EDS, AEM, localhost:3000, dev servers, or framework targets in outputs or narration.
